assertions.rationale: FakeAuthHandler extends AuthenticationHandler<AuthenticationSchemeOptions> with a proper HandleAuthenticateAsync implementation.

assertions.assertion: Includes an ITestClaimsProvider (or equivalent) interface that allows setting claims per-test
assertions.rationale: Uses a static property FakeAuthHandler.TestUser instead of an ITestClaimsProvider interface. A static property is not an interface — it lacks the abstraction and testability contract that an interface provides.

assertions.assertion: The WebApplicationFactory registers the test auth scheme via AddAuthentication and AddScheme
Shows a test that calls ClearClaims (or equivalent) and asserts 401 Unauthorized
assertions.rationale: The Unauthenticated_Returns401 test sets FakeAuthHandler.TestUser = null (equivalent of clearing claims) and asserts HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT disable authorization entirely — authorization policies remain active
assertions.rationale: The factory only replaces the authentication scheme. No authorization policies are removed or bypassed.
